title: Shadow Convoy
subtitle: Surface Vessel Intercept Training

briefing.situation: A three-ship RED convoy is transiting through sector ECHO-4, heading east toward their destination waypoint. The convoy consists of unarmed cargo vessels maintaining close formation at approximately 5 knots.
briefing.mission: Shadow the convoy and practice contact management procedures. When ready, execute an intercept to disable or destroy the convoy before they reach their destination.
briefing.execution: Approach from the south using passive sonar to track the convoy. Maintain EMCON - avoid active sonar emissions that could alert the convoy. Position for a firing solution on the lead vessel. One well-placed torpedo should cause the convoy to scatter.
briefing.threats: The convoy is unarmed and has no escort. However, maintaining stealth is essential for weapons training. Speed and noise discipline will determine mission success.
briefing.notes: This is a training exercise focused on contact tracking and weapons employment. Take your time to establish a quality firing solution. Weapons release is authorized.

red_mission_summary: RED convoy must reach the waypoint while maintaining formation and avoiding detection. No weapons available, so speed and evasion are critical.
blue_mission_summary: BLUE submarine will shadow the RED convoy and practice contact management and weapons procedures. Maintain EMCON and interdict the convoy.
objective: Track and intercept the enemy convoy before they reach their destination.
blue_captain_summary: Training mission. BLUE will shadow the RED convoy (red-01, red-02, red-03) and practice contact management and weapons procedures. Maintain EMCON. BLUE objective: interdict or delay convoy. RED objective: escort convoy to waypoint with minimal risk.
roe: Minimize active sonar to preserve EMCON.

ship_behaviors.red-01: You are red-01, a convoy cargo vessel with no weapons so speed and evasion is critical. Follow FleetIntent to reach waypoint X:5000, Y:0. You may override the FleetIntent if it is not safe. Hold column position and spacing; avoid high-risk areas.
ship_behaviors.red-02: You are red-02, a convoy cargo vessel with no weapons so speed and evasion is critical. Follow FleetIntent to reach waypoint X:5000, Y:0. You may override the FleetIntent if it is not safe. Hold column position and spacing; avoid high-risk areas.
ship_behaviors.red-03: You are red-03, a convoy cargo vessel with no weapons so speed and evasion is critical. Follow FleetIntent to reach waypoint X:5000, Y:0. You may override the FleetIntent if it is not safe. Hold column position and spacing; avoid high-risk areas.

triggers.comms: INFO: Surface contact maintaining 5 kn on easterly course.
